# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this project, please:

1. **DO NOT** disclose the issue publicly.
2. Send details to fntsy42@pm.me including:
   - A description of the vulnerability.
   - Steps to reproduce.
   - Affected versions.
   - Any relevant screenshots or logs.

## Security Update Process

1. The maintainers will acknowledge receipt of your vulnerability report.
2. We will investigate the issue and keep you updated on our findings.
3. If the vulnerability is confirmed, we will work on a fix and agree on a release timeline.
4. Once the issue is patched, we will publish a security advisory through GitHub.

## Best Practices

- Keep your dependencies up to date.
- Always use the latest stable version of this library.
- Enable security alerts in your GitHub repository.
- Follow security best practices in your own implementations.

Security updates are released through our GitHub repository.
